requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (RSB PVoC + RS / IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（RSB PVoC + RS／IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（RSB PVoC + RS／IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires imported into Rwanda are regulated electrical products and are normally assessed under the Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, which requires a Certificate of Conformity per consignment before shipment. Safety is judged against the relevant Rwanda Standard (RS), which adopts IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests) and the applicable IEC 60598-2 particular-requirement parts. The assessment covers protection against electric shock (creepage / clearance, insulation, touch current), thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals. Because Rwanda is landlocked, goods arrive via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam; the S-Mark / import-inspection and Certificate of Conformity must be in place so the consignment clears RSB inspection at entry. Verify the 230 V / 50 Hz rating is within the product marking.
summary.zh: 进口至卢旺达的 LED 灯具属于受管制电气产品，通常依据卢旺达标准局（RSB）出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划评定，须在出货前取得逐批符合性证书。安全性依据相应卢旺达标准（RS）评定，该标准采用 IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）及适用的 IEC 60598-2 特殊要求部分。评定涵盖防触电（爬电距离／电气间隙、绝缘、接触电流）、热耐久、机械强度及接线端子。由于卢旺达为内陆国，货物经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆抵达；须落实 S-Mark／进口检验及符合性证书，使货物在入境时通过 RSB 检验。须核验产品标识包含 230 V／50 Hz 额定值。
summary.zht: 進口至盧旺達的 LED 燈具屬於受管制電氣產品，通常依據盧旺達標準局（RSB）出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計劃評定，須在出貨前取得逐批符合性證書。安全性依據相應盧旺達標準（RS）評定，該標準採用 IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）及適用的 IEC 60598-2 特殊要求部分。評定涵蓋防觸電（爬電距離／電氣間隙、絕緣、接觸電流）、熱耐久、機械強度及接線端子。由於盧旺達為內陸國，貨物經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆抵達；須落實 S-Mark／進口檢驗及符合性證書，使貨物在入境時通過 RSB 檢驗。須核驗產品標識包含 230 V／50 Hz 額定值。

standards_or_laws: RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment
RS / IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (adopted Rwanda Standard)
RS / IEC 60598-2 series — Luminaires — Part 2: Particular requirements (applicable part by luminaire type)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; the edition change moved the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T. CCC obligations for in-scope residential luminaires remain governed by CNCA rules (CNCA-C10-01) rather than the GB/T designation alone. Both GB 7000.1 and the Rwanda-adopted RS / IEC 60598-1 share a common IEC 60598-1 base, but the conformity-assessment route differs: China uses third-party CCC; Rwanda uses the RSB PVoC / Certificate-of-Conformity route at export and import.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；换版将标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T。范围内居民灯具的 CCC 义务仍由 CNCA 规则（CNCA-C10-01）决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定。GB 7000.1 与卢旺达采用的 RS／IEC 60598-1 同以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，但合格评定路径不同：中国采用第三方 CCC；卢旺达在出口与进口环节采用 RSB PVoC／符合性证书路径。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；換版將標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T。範圍內居民燈具的 CCC 義務仍由 CNCA 規則（CNCA-C10-01）決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定。GB 7000.1 與盧旺達採用的 RS／IEC 60598-1 同以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，但合格評定路徑不同：中國採用第三方 CCC；盧旺達在出口與進口環節採用 RSB PVoC／符合性證書路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both sides derive from IEC 60598-1, so the technical safety baseline is broadly comparable, but the access route differs: Rwanda requires an RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment plus S-Mark / import inspection at entry, whereas China uses domestic third-party CCC. Existing Chinese CCC certificates and GB/T 7000.1 reports are not automatically accepted by RSB — the PVoC body typically relies on IEC 60598-based test reports, often from ILAC-accredited laboratories, and may require its own inspection or testing. Voltage marking must reflect Rwanda's 230 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V), so verify the rated-voltage range and any country-specific marking. There is no EU-style Authorised Representative concept; instead an in-country importer of record handles clearance and inspection.
gap.zh: 双方均源自 IEC 60598-1，故安全技术基线大致相当，但准入路径不同：卢旺达要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性证书并在入境时进行 S-Mark／进口检验，而中国采用境内第三方 CCC。现有中国 CCC 证书及 GB/T 7000.1 报告不会被 RSB 自动接受——PVoC 机构通常采用基于 IEC 60598 的检测报告（多来自 ILAC 认可实验室），并可能要求自行检验或检测。电压标识须反映卢旺达 230 V／50 Hz 电网（50 Hz 与中国相同；标称电压与中国 220 V 不同），故须核验额定电压范围及任何国别标识。不存在欧盟式授权代表概念；而是由在卢进口商（进口记录人）负责清关与检验。
gap.zht: 雙方均源自 IEC 60598-1，故安全技術基線大致相當，但准入路徑不同：盧旺達要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性證書並在入境時進行 S-Mark／進口檢驗，而中國採用境內第三方 CCC。現有中國 CCC 證書及 GB/T 7000.1 報告不會被 RSB 自動接受——PVoC 機構通常採用基於 IEC 60598 的檢測報告（多來自 ILAC 認可實驗室），並可能要求自行檢驗或檢測。電壓標識須反映盧旺達 230 V／50 Hz 電網（50 Hz 與中國相同；標稱電壓與中國 220 V 不同），故須核驗額定電壓範圍及任何國別標識。不存在歐盟式授權代表概念；而是由在盧進口商（進口記錄人）負責清關與檢驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — regulated electrical product; RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity and S-Mark / import inspection required before clearance into Rwanda
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire is within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Rwanda are regulated and require an RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment plus S-Mark / import inspection, assessed against RS / IEC 60598-1. Although GB 7000.1 and RS / IEC 60598-1 share an IEC base, Chinese CCC certificates are not automatically accepted; the PVoC route typically relies on IEC-based test reports from accredited labs. Verify the 230 V / 50 Hz rating and appoint an in-country importer of record.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卢旺达的 LED 灯具属受管制产品，须取得逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性证书并通过 S-Mark／进口检验，依据 RS／IEC 60598-1 评定。尽管 GB 7000.1 与 RS／IEC 60598-1 同以 IEC 为基础，中国 CCC 证书不会被自动接受；PVoC 路径通常采用来自认可实验室的基于 IEC 的检测报告。须核验 230 V／50 Hz 额定值并指定在卢进口记录人。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入盧旺達的 LED 燈具屬受管制產品，須取得逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性證書並通過 S-Mark／進口檢驗，依據 RS／IEC 60598-1 評定。儘管 GB 7000.1 與 RS／IEC 60598-1 同以 IEC 為基礎，中國 CCC 證書不會被自動接受；PVoC 路徑通常採用來自認可實驗室的基於 IEC 的檢測報告。須核驗 230 V／50 Hz 額定值並指定在盧進口記錄人。

requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全（RS／IEC 62560）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全（RS／IEC 62560）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (retrofit bulbs with integrated control gear, > 50 V) sold into Rwanda are assessed under the Rwanda Standard adopting IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Safety specifications), within the RSB PVoC programme. The standard covers interchangeability, protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, mechanical strength of the cap, torque, and resistance to heat and fire. A Certificate of Conformity per consignment and S-Mark / import inspection apply as for luminaires. The lamp cap and rated voltage must suit the Rwandan 230 V / 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 在卢旺达销售的自镇流 LED 灯（带集成控制装置的替换灯泡，> 50 V）依据采用 IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）的卢旺达标准在 RSB PVoC 计划内评定。该标准涵盖互换性、防触电、绝缘电阻与介电强度、灯头机械强度、扭矩，以及耐热与耐燃。与灯具相同，须取得逐批符合性证书并通过 S-Mark／进口检验。灯头与额定电压须适配卢旺达 230 V／50 Hz 供电。
summary.zht: 在盧旺達銷售的自鎮流 LED 燈（帶集成控制裝置的替換燈泡，> 50 V）依據採用 IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）的盧旺達標準在 RSB PVoC 計劃內評定。該標準涵蓋互換性、防觸電、絕緣電阻與介電強度、燈頭機械強度、扭矩，以及耐熱與耐燃。與燈具相同，須取得逐批符合性證書並通過 S-Mark／進口檢驗。燈頭與額定電壓須適配盧旺達 230 V／50 Hz 供電。

standards_or_laws: RS / IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (adopted Rwanda Standard)
RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment

summary.en: China's equivalent safety standard for self-ballasted LED lamps is GB 24906-2010 / GB 24906 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements), aligned with IEC 62560. Such lamps fall within CCC scope for the Chinese market under the applicable CNCA rules. The Chinese CCC certificate and GB 24906 test report are domestic conformity evidence and are not automatically accepted under the RSB PVoC route, which relies on IEC 62560-based reports.
summary.zh: 中国对应的自镇流 LED 灯安全标准为 GB 24906-2010／GB 24906（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐。此类灯在中国市场依适用 CNCA 规则纳入 CCC 范围。中国 CCC 证书及 GB 24906 检测报告属境内合格证据，不会被 RSB PVoC 路径自动接受——该路径采用基于 IEC 62560 的报告。
summary.zht: 中國對應的自鎮流 LED 燈安全標準為 GB 24906-2010／GB 24906（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊。此類燈在中國市場依適用 CNCA 規則納入 CCC 範圍。中國 CCC 證書及 GB 24906 檢測報告屬境內合格證據，不會被 RSB PVoC 路徑自動接受——該路徑採用基於 IEC 62560 的報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements (aligned with IEC 62560)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for lighting products

gap.en: GB 24906 and RS / IEC 62560 are both based on IEC 62560, so the safety content is largely aligned. The practical gap is the access route and report acceptance: Rwanda requires the RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment and S-Mark / import inspection, and does not automatically accept Chinese CCC certificates. The PVoC body normally requires an IEC 62560 test report, often from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, and may inspect or re-test the consignment. Lamp caps and rated voltage must suit 230 V / 50 Hz. An in-country importer of record (not an EU-style authorised representative) handles clearance.
gap.zh: GB 24906 与 RS／IEC 62560 均基于 IEC 62560，故安全内容基本一致。实际差距在于准入路径与报告接受：卢旺达要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性证书并进行 S-Mark／进口检验，且不自动接受中国 CCC 证书。PVoC 机构通常要求 IEC 62560 检测报告（多来自 ILAC 认可实验室），并可能对货物进行检验或复测。灯头与额定电压须适配 230 V／50 Hz。由在卢进口记录人（而非欧盟式授权代表）负责清关。
gap.zht: GB 24906 與 RS／IEC 62560 均基於 IEC 62560，故安全內容基本一致。實際差距在於准入路徑與報告接受：盧旺達要求逐批 RSB PVoC 符合性證書並進行 S-Mark／進口檢驗，且不自動接受中國 CCC 證書。PVoC 機構通常要求 IEC 62560 檢測報告（多來自 ILAC 認可實驗室），並可能對貨物進行檢驗或複測。燈頭與額定電壓須適配 230 V／50 Hz。由在盧進口記錄人（而非歐盟式授權代表）負責清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity and S-Mark / import inspection required; assessed against RS / IEC 62560
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the self-ballasted LED lamp is within CNCA scope; GB 24906 is the applicable safety standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Rwanda are assessed against RS / IEC 62560 within the RSB PVoC programme, requiring a Certificate of Conformity per consignment and S-Mark / import inspection. GB 24906 and IEC 62560 are aligned in content, but Chinese CCC certificates are not automatically accepted; an IEC 62560 report from an accredited lab is typically required. Confirm cap type and 230 V / 50 Hz rating.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向卢旺达的自镇流 LED 灯在 RSB PVoC 计划内依据 RS／IEC 62560 评定，须取得逐批符合性证书并通过 S-Mark／进口检验。GB 24906 与 IEC 62560 内容一致，但中国 CCC 证书不会被自动接受；通常须提供来自认可实验室的 IEC 62560 报告。须确认灯头型号及 230 V／50 Hz 额定值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向盧旺達的自鎮流 LED 燈在 RSB PVoC 計劃內依據 RS／IEC 62560 評定，須取得逐批符合性證書並通過 S-Mark／進口檢驗。GB 24906 與 IEC 62560 內容一致，但中國 CCC 證書不會被自動接受；通常須提供來自認可實驗室的 IEC 62560 報告。須確認燈頭型號及 230 V／50 Hz 額定值。
